The man on the right is barefoot while wearing shin guards.
There are at least four blue punching bags hanging in the background.
The man on the left wears headgear and gloves in the second frame but not the first.

spatial: Two men stand on a blue matted floor in the foreground. Behind them is a white wall with a red horizontal beam near the ceiling, from which several blue punching bags are suspended.

visible_entities.desc: Person wearing black long-sleeve shirt, black Muay Thai shorts with gold designs, black shin guards, red/black gloves, and black headgear
visible_entities.action: sparring, blocking a kick in first frame, throwing a punch in second frame

visible_entities.desc: Person with beard, wearing black t-shirt, black shorts with white side stripe, and black shin guards
visible_entities.action: sparring, throwing a roundhouse kick in first frame, standing in guard stance in second frame

visible_entities.desc: Multiple blue cylindrical punching bags hanging from red mounts
Blue floor mats
Digital timer with green digits

atomic_facts.fact: Two individuals are engaged in martial arts sparring on a blue mat.
The person on the right executes a high kick towards the person on the left in the first frame.
The person on the left throws a right-hand punch in the second frame.
Four blue heavy bags are visible hanging in the background.
The person on the left wears headgear and gloves, while the person on the right does not wear headgear.

spatial: Two fighters occupy the center foreground on a blue mat. A row of blue punching bags hangs against a white wall with red trim in the background. A digital clock is mounted high on the wall.
